jobs.title: Senior Member Technical Staff
jobs.summary: Full-stack engineering on enterprise marketing and customer-data software: services, admin experiences, APIs, and integrations. Scrum lead for iterative delivery with product and customers. Work spans data-driven marketing workflows, AI-assisted capabilities where policy allows, and the operational controls that keep customer-facing features reliable and trustworthy.

jobs.title: Member Technical Staff
jobs.summary: Software engineering on marketing-technology products following the Buddy Media acquisition; backend and platform work that set the stage for later full-stack and data-centric roles.

jobs.title: Developer
jobs.summary: Web and platform development for social marketing products; continued at Salesforce after the acquisition.
